sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), data XML, age INT);
INSERT INTO users (name, data, age) VALUES ('Alice', '<root><element>Sample</element></root>', 30);
INSERT INTO users (name, data, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL, 25);
INSERT INTO users (name, data, age) VALUES ('Charlie', '<root><element>Test</element></root>', NULL);
SELECT NEW UserType(id, name, NEW XMLType(data)) FROM users WHERE age > 20;
SELECT user_id, XMLType.transform(data) FROM (SELECT id AS user_id, data FROM users WHERE name IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT u.id, u.name, NEW UserType(u.id, u.name, NEW XMLType(IFNULL(u.data, '<default/>'))) FROM users u WHERE u.age < 30;
SELECT NEW UserType(u.id, u.name, xslt(u.data)) FROM users u WHERE u.data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT NEW UserType(u.id, u.name, NEW XMLType(concat(data, '<additional/>'))) FROM users u) AS new_users WHERE new_users.id IS NOT NULL;
WITH UserData AS (SELECT id, data FROM users) SELECT NEW UserType(ud.id, ud.data) FROM UserData ud JOIN users u ON ud.id = u.id WHERE u.age >= 25;
